name: triage-board
description: Standalone zero-JS HTML triage board: a toolbar with a count summary and filter chips above static kanban columns (Now / Next / Later / Cut), each holding triaged ticket cards with a tag and a sub-line. No drag-and-drop scripting.

slots.description: Board title; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label above the title.
Header prose describing what the board triages.
Toolbar count summary line (totals per column).
Filter chips shown in the toolbar (e.g. tags or owners).
Kanban columns; each renders a .col with a name, item count, and ticket cards.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.columns[]: { name: string, count: number, items: item[] }
shape.item[]: { title: string, tag: enum[bug,feat,chore,debt], sub: string }
